metadata.title: Black Bear Tech | We Solve Your Business Problems With Technology
metadata.description: Struggling with business problems? We build tech solutions for you. Automation, app development, websites, and data security.

hero.headline: Your Business Problems?
hero.subtext: Tell us what's slowing you down. We'll build the tech solution — and make it simple.

wizard.step2Title: What's your biggest challenge right now?

services.title: How We Help
services.subtitle: Every business problem has a tech solution. We build it — simply and clearly.

ai.title: Smart Automation That Works For You
ai.description: Save hours of repetitive manual work. Smart systems that learn and improve over time.

web.title: Your Business Online — Web & Apps
web.description: A professional digital presence that reflects your quality and attracts customers 24/7.

saas.title: Software That Works From Anywhere
saas.description: Custom cloud software for your business, accessible from any computer, phone, or tablet.

consulting.title: A Tech Expert for Your Digital Future
consulting.description: Clear, simplified tech consulting that helps you make the right decisions.

fintech.title: Secure Online Payments, Fast & Reliable
fintech.description: Accept your customers' payments online safely and effortlessly.

support.title: Always-On Support — We've Got You
support.description: A support team available around the clock. Your problem gets solved before it affects your business.

hosting.title: Your Site Stays Up — Always
hosting.description: Fast, reliable hosting that ensures your customers can find you whenever they need you.

about.title: We've seen your problem before. And solved it.
about.p1: Black Bear Tech is the technology arm of the Black Bear Group. We work with business owners who want systems that actually work — not technical promises.
about.p2: We believe technology should solve a real problem, not complicate things. That's why we always start with one question:
about.question: What's slowing your business down right now?

brands.title: The Black Bear Family
brands.subtitle: A family of specialized brands, each focused on a specific domain to deliver the best solutions.

footer.description: Building technology that solves real business problems. Across the Middle East and beyond.

about_page.title: About Us
about_page.subtitle: We are a team of tech experts focused on solving real business problems. We don't make complex promises; we build systems that work efficiently and stably.
about_page.missionText: To simplify technology for business owners and empower them to grow without worrying about the tech side.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: Complex systems eventually fail. We believe in direct and easy solutions.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Built to last. Sites that don't crash and systems that hold up under pressure.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.desc: Your success is our success. We are an extension of your team, not just a tech contractor.

solutions_page.title: Our Solutions
solutions_page.subtitle: Browse our range of services designed to meet your business needs step by step.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.subtitle: Ready to solve your tech problems? Our team is available to answer your questions and start immediately.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Your message was sent successfully! We will contact you soon.
form.error: An error occurred while sending. Please try again later.
